evals.prompt: Save this visit summary from yesterday's pediatrician appointment: <pasted text>
evals.expected_output: An updated wiki/health/{person}-medical.md page with the visit appended, medications/providers updated as side-effects, and any new follow-up callouts.

evals.prompt: Ingest this EOB PDF from Cigna.
evals.expected_output: ingest-document is invoked on the PDF; clean markdown lands in raw/, then medical schema is applied and the result is appended to the right person's medical summary.

evals.prompt: Track this lab result for Mom.
evals.expected_output: Lab values are extracted and appended to wiki/health/mom-medical.md with date, ordering provider, and abnormal-flag callouts.
